name: Ben Carson
subject: Do you want to attend the first GOP debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206858:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r)
---
|

Peter,
The first Republican presidential primary debate on August 6 is right around the corner, and I'm sure you were planning to watch it live on Fox News.

But, as a strong supporter, we'd like to give you and a guest the chance to join us in Cleveland so you can watch it live and in person. My campaign will be taking care of all the transportation and accommodations.

**[To be automatically entered in our new sweepstakes, please donate $5 or more today.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206858:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r)
** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206858:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r)
---
This is an opportunity for you to be part of something special, and it will be great to know you're there cheering me on from the audience.

**[Our sweepstakes will only run until Tuesday, July 28, so I hope you'll donate $5 or more to be automatically entered right now](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206858:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r).**

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. You may enter sweepstakes without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206859:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "FIRST GOP DEBATE" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206860:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Cleveland, transportation, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This sweepstakes is sponsored by Carson America, Inc. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29206858:28026552528:m:1:876315805:B82680AC011058A9149A9279F8AA179E:r)
---

name: John Kasich
subject: I'm running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29210662:28029057946:m:1:958431888:D91EFDEA532D082E65E5982937D8CB5B:r)
Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know that I've decided to run for President of the United States of America.

**You can do three things to help me right now:**

1\. [Donate $25, $50, or more today to help us have the resources](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29210663:28029057946:m:1:958431888:D91EFDEA532D082E65E5982937D8CB5B:r) we need to be successful.

2\. Visit [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29210662:28029057946:m:1:958431888:D91EFDEA532D082E65E5982937D8CB5B:r) and sign up to help our campaign.

_**When we win**_ , we will show Washington how to cut taxes, balance the federal budget, and create jobs.

_**When we win**_ , we will make Americans safer and restore our leadership around the world.

_**When we win**_ , we will find solutions to the problems our leaders have ignored for far too long.

[Are you ready to help?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29210663:28029057946:m:1:958431888:D91EFDEA532D082E65E5982937D8CB5B:r)

Sincerely,

**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio
[www.JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29210662:28029057946:m:1:958431888:D91EFDEA532D082E65E5982937D8CB5B:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/ismSAEsmNe). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osmSAEsmNe)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osmSAEsmNe) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28029057946-echo3-F1F4256CB26496271033291523E16C2B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Our response to Donald Trump
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend, this is the time when Senator Graham needs your support
the most.

Friend,

Donald Trump continues to show hourly that he is ill-prepared to
be Commander-in-Chief.

The two people most excited about Donald Trump's candidacy are
Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton. Because of Trump's bombastic
and ridiculous campaign, we aren't talking about Obama's horrible
deal with Iran or Hillary Clinton's plans to continue Obama's
failed national security agenda.

Friend, this is the time when Senator Graham needs your support
the most. Click here to help now.

Senator Graham and I both appreciate your friendship.

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.

name: Jeb Bush
subject: How are you watching the first debate?
body:
Friend,

In just a little over two weeks, I'll be walking on stage for the first debate of the 2016 Presidential Election, and I want you to be there.

Today we're officially launching our first Debate Watch Party contest where we'll fly one lucky winner on an all-expense paid trip to Cleveland to attend our first Debate Watch Party.

[**All you have to do is add your name today to automatically enter to win a free trip to attend our Debate Watch Party live.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jmthctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpntts_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

It's going to be an exciting night, the first time I'll be on stage with the others competing for your vote and I promise you, you don't want to miss this.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rvgfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbslkkc_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We'll cover the flight, the hotel and the ticket to our official Debate Watch Party, but only if you enter right now: [**Jeb2016.com/DebateWatchContest**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vggbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcykkv_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Sometimes we hold an extra ticket on these contests and release them later, this ISN'T one of those times. There is only one ticket available.

So if you want a chance to watch the first debate of the Presidential election live from our Debate Watch Party, enter now: [**Jeb2016.com/DebateWatchContest**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dmdkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbjrrh_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Before I head on stage I'll be swinging by, and I want to see you there. What do you have to lose?

[**Add your name to enter today.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bqbkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnzjjj_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you and I hope to see you there!

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/plvtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgvyym_apthhslb.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1518&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/news/debate_watch_party_official_rules?lang=en). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://www.jeb2016.com/debatewatchcontest). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://www.jeb2016.com/donate/debatewatch?lang=en). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://www.jeb2016.com/debatewatchcontest). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, July 21, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Tuesday, August 4, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Tuesday, August 4, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Debate Watch Party, with an approximate retail value of $5,400; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $6,625. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/news/debate_watch_party_official_rules?lang=en). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: dinner?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me for dinner? | Friend --

I'd like to get to know you, and I can't think of a better way to do that than sitting down to dinner together.

[**Today, if you add your name, you 'll be entered for the chance to be flown out with a guest to have dinner with me on the campaign trail.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

We don't have to talk politics or get too serious -- no homework assignments before this dinner. I just want to know what's on your mind, and I'd like to thank you for being a part of this team.

The campaign will take care of your travel and accommodations, so you can relax and enjoy our time together.

**Add your name right now for the chance to meet me on the campaign trail:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

See you for dinner,

Hillary

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/26/15 and 7/30/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) Winner and a guest will receive a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMwOTkyNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMDc5NzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Sin, Not Skin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
---
| |
### Friend,

We don't have a _skin_ problem in America, we have a _sin_ problem in America.

There is a prescription for our country, though. What is it? Click below and watch...

[ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYxMjgtNTY4NTZlNDctNTk3NS00Y2VjLWJkMmItN2ZkZDVlNDAwNjY5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Nzk3OGE2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vYmxvZ3M%2fSUQ9Q0ExQjg2NzktMUY0QS00MjQxLTlCOTAtMTRBNDhGMkM5MzdEJnM9OUkyMA0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d)
Sincerely,

Mike Huckabee
|

clean_body: | | | Friend, We don't have a skin problem in America, we have a sin problem in America. There is a prescription for our country, though. What is it? Click below and watch... Sincerely, Mike Huckabee | ---|---|--- Paid for by Huckabee for President | | * This e-mail was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Mike Huckabee for President Huckabee for President PO Box 3357 Little Rock, AR 72203 Phone: 1-844-780-6785 Fax: N/A

name: Team Bernie
subject: Organizing our campaign near Silver Spring
body:
#
Dear Friend,
Bernie just spoke to eleven thousand in Arizona. Fifteen thousand in Texas. These numbers are totally unprecedented for this stage in a presidential election in any state, let alone Red states. Millions of people are stepping up and signing up to build a movement around Bernie's campaign.
What next? This: On the evening of July 29th, Bernie will speak to another unprecedented crowd. [**And this time, no matter where you live, you can attend.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d709a/4220107564/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi") Bernie will be speaking via video to more than 1,500 separate events -- all organized by volunteers, in their homes, in local pubs and coffee shops, in union halls, and in large auditoriums.
Reserve your spot at a kickoff meeting near you before everything fills up: [**Click here to see the meetings near you.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d709a/4220107564/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi")
Why are so many people coming out to support Bernie? Because we know who he is -- and he knows who he his. We know who he stands for -- the people -- and who he doesn't stand for -- the billionaire class. And anyone who watches Bernie speak for even a few minutes sees what we already know: he's not a stage-managed triangulator -- he's the real deal.
[**That 's why it's so important on July 29, that you not only bring yourself, but bring your friends too.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d709a/4220107564/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi")
This is just the beginning, team. This is only our first official organizing kickoff. And we all know where this is going to end: With a grassroots movement powerful enough to take this country back from the billionaire class -- and Bernie in the White House to help us do it.
Let's go!
Team Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d709b/4220107564/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150721attendees")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d7098/4220107564/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d7099/4220107564/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d7086/4220107564/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ac/43f17890/5c9114c6/621d7087/4220107564/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rand Paul
subject: Video: destroy the tax code
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Burn it.

Shove it through a wood chipper.

Or chop it up with a chainsaw.

How would you destroy our over 70,000 page tax code?

**[My campaign has prepared a special video about my plan to drive a stake through the heart of the IRS and I hope you will take a few moments to watch it](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629589-2c69361ef7-bcef8992f1)**.

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629589-2c69361ef7-bcef8992f1)

Fellow Conservative, my 14.5% Fair and Flat tax plan will return over $2 trillion to the American people.

It's your money and the Washington Machine is going to have to learn to live on a diet.

In fact, the lobbyists and insiders who game the system will hate my plan the most.

But that's ok.

I'm not running to "manage" Washington.

Business-as-usual plunged our nation $18.3 trillion in debt and allows our tax code to strangle economic growth.

I'm in this race to upend the status quo and defeat the Washington Machine.

Fellow Conservative, that starts with kicking the IRS out of your life for good.

My plan is the biggest and boldest tax cut in American history.

It slashes FICA – the worker tax – to zero. It's gone for good.

Ronald Reagan ignited an economic boom that carried our country for two decades by slashing tax rates.

My plan will follow his model by providing real economic stimulus and exploding the GDP over 10% in the first ten years.

And you will be able to file your taxes on a simple one page form.

I can hear the shrieks from Capitol Hill.

The special interests and the entrenched politicians already label me "Enemy #1."

And with polls showing me leading Hillary Clinton in key swing states, I know they are going to double-down on their smear campaign against me.

**[So please take a few moments to watch my campaign's video and complete your "Fair and Flat Tax Now!" petition](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629589-2c69361ef7-bcef8992f1)**.

After you add your name, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign get this video in front of as many voters in the key early caucus and primary states as possible.

I'm fighting to take our country back. I hope you will join me today.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629592-b3364af814-bcef8992f1)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629593-0124a991c2-bcef8992f1)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629594-160ba7d2a3-bcef8992f1)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629595-cb4404fce0-bcef8992f1)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629589-2c69361ef7-bcef8992f1)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629589-2c69361ef7-bcef8992f1)

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629596-ee11292885-bcef8992f1) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629597-7e6975a736-bcef8992f1) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-1629598-6bf4b0c350-bcef8992f1)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

[Unsubscribe](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-119520316-1371-78994-169358-f73e30ade84114f-bcef8992f1)
